title: Melody
description: A Modpack centred around progression and the Multiplayer experience
body:
Melody modpack aims to completly overhaul the progression system in minecraft and enchance multiplayer experiences, slowing down the progression a lot, hopefully without feeling to restrictive on those who wanna blitz progression but still slow em down so that they dont immediatley get bored after defeating the ender dragon on ur server. It also expands on many of the different playstyles of all different players while making players have to work together and benefit from what eachothers efforts. to top it all off theres plenty of smaller mods to enchance messing around with your friends. This modpack is made with small community servers in mind and strives to make that experience the best it can be, as a result singleplayer and larger multiplayer servers are not the intention but are still viable and can definetly still be enjoyed.

Melody modpack 1.0 coming soon 

(deleted the banner cause half of that old stuff aint relevant anymore but ill make another once i finish some polishing)
